content.speakerText: All set! Have a great trip home!
content.speakerTextCn: 搞定啦！祝您回家旅途愉快！

options.text: Thanks so much! You've been wonderful.
Okay, I'll call you if I need help.
Can I get a receipt later?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks so much! You've been wonderful.' 是对服务人员祝福的礼貌回应，表达真诚感谢。其他选项要么是无关请求（如索要收据），要么是负面反馈（如抱怨房间噪音），或不恰当的后续对话，不符合道别场景的礼貌语境。

content.speakerText: Hope to see you again soon!

options.text: I don't think I'll come back.
Can I leave my luggage here?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'I definitely will! Thanks again.' 明确表达了再次光临的意愿，符合礼貌回应的语用规范。其他选项要么是消极否定（不会回来），要么是无关的询问（关门时间、寄存行李），与道别时表达感谢和回访意愿的语境不符。

content.speakerText: Thank you for everything. Have a safe journey!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢您的一切，祝您旅途平安！

options.text: I need to check out tomorrow.
Could you call me a ride?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! Take care!' 是对感谢和祝福的自然回应，符合道别场景的双向礼貌互动。其他选项要么是抱怨（账单太贵），要么是请求服务（叫车），或误解为尚未完成手续，均不符合道别阶段的语境。

content.hint: 表达对服务人员的高度评价时常用词
content.knowledgePoint: 情感评价形容词搭配（wonderful用于服务评价）

content.hint: 表达强烈意愿的副词，用于回应‘希望再见到你’
content.knowledgePoint: 表达确定意愿的副词搭配（I definitely will）

content.hint: 非正式道别时的常用词，常与 'Appreciate it!' 连用
content.knowledgePoint: 非正式道别表达（Appreciate it! Bye!）

content.speakerText: All set! Have a great trip home!
content.speakerTextCn: 搞定啦！祝您回家旅途愉快！
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! You've been wonderful.
Thank you so much — I really appreciate it!
Cool, thanks! You guys are awesome!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了真诚感谢
语言准确性：语法正确，无严重错误
表达自然度：符合英语口语习惯，语气得体
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'appreciate', 'wonderful/awesome' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Hope to see you again soon!
expectedAnswers: I hope so too — I’ll definitely be back next year!
For sure! Your service was great.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了再次光临的意愿
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合英语母语者道别习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'definitely', 'back', 'thanks', 'service' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Thank you for your help today. Safe travels!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢您今天的帮助，祝您旅途平安！
expectedAnswers: Thank you! I really appreciate your kindness.
Thanks a lot — you’ve made my stay so pleasant!
I’m grateful for everything. Have a great day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了感谢并表达感激之情
语言准确性：用词得体，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合服务场景的礼貌结尾
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thank', 'appreciate', 'grateful', 'kindness', 'pleasant' 等情感词汇
